arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester United vs. Arsenal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Manchester United and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal set to open talks for star with 80 goals in his last three seasons
arts.sum: Arsenal are looking to improve their attacking unit during the summer transfer window and they are looking at Inter Milan striker Lautaro Martinez as a potential option. The 27-year-old has been a reliable goal scorer for the Italian club in recent seasons and could prove to be a world-class acquisition for Arsenal if they can […] The post Arsenal set to open talks for star with 80 goals in his last three seasons appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Club make last minute move to steal appointment from Arsenal – Gunners have ‘long established contact’
arts.sum: AC Milan are planning a last-minute attempt to try and hire director of football Andrea Bert and keep him out of Arsenal’s hands. That’s according to Corriere della Sera, relayed by Tuttomercatoweb, who cover the situation around in the in-demand director today. arts.ttl: Red-hot Man Utd rumour opens up PERFECT chance for Jonathan David
arts.sum: Red-hot Man Utd rumour opens up PERFECT chance for Jonathan David Manchester United hold the key to opening the door for Canada ace Jonathan David to make his perfect move in the summer transfer window – but that would not be to Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man United contract claim, Chelsea 'doubt', Spanish lessons - Kobbie Mainoo future latest
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United transfer news and rumours including an update on Kobbie Mainoo's future at Old trafford

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Los Blancos 'eyeing £17m deal' for William Saliba alternative
arts.sum: Real Madrid allegedly up their interest in Valencia defender Yarek Gasiorowski, who has also been linked with Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News: Ruben Amorim 'impressed' with €40m Geovany Quenda alternative Roger Fernandes
arts.sum: Manchester United are keeping tabs on Braga youngster Roger Fernandes as a potential alternative to Geovany Quenda, according to a report. According to Graeme Bailey, Man Utd scouts have been left very impressed with Braga youngster Roger Fernandes.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Make Contact With £50m-Rated Striker After Gaining an ‘Edge on Arsenal’
arts.sum: Liverpool are interested in RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko, who is also a target for Arsenal. Arne Slot is eager to replace Darwin Nunez.

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd drops Rangers one liner to shut Soccer Saturday pals up as he undercuts hasty Man United 'need' claim
arts.sum: The Portuguese boss saw the Premier League giants held to a 1-1 Europa League draw with Real Sociedad

arts.ttl: Man United vs. Arsenal: Chido Obi's "narrative" ready to be written in Old Trafford Premier League reunion
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts admits that the "narrative is there to be written" for Chido Obi to make himself a Manchester United hero in Sunday's Premier League clash.
